snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 15 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 21st May 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 15 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 21st May 21

https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Did you know Har Pal Geo is now in the US? Subscribe and hit the bell icon to catch Top Pakistani Dramas and satisfy all your entertainment needs

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :

Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal
Momina Iqbal as Naheed

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

snippet.title: अमीर स्टूडेंट गरीब बन गया || गरीब के साथ कपड़े बदलना ! अमीर vs गरीब स्टूडेंट 123 GO! SCHOOL पर
snippet.description:
केट को एक सबक सिखाने का समय है

अमीर से गरीब , आपके पास और पैसे नही होंगे !

आपको लगता है कि आप बहुत सारे पैसो के बिना रह सकते हो ?

इसके लिए सिर्फ थोड़ी क्रिएटिविटी और एक पॉजिटिव अत्तिटुडे चाहिए !

और थोड़ी से दयालुता जो जरूरत मंद के काम आ सके ! शेयर करना न भूले !!

आपने देखा ? 123 GO! SCHOOL को सब्सक्राइब करे

#123go #backtoschool #richvsbroke

123 GO! SCHOOL Hindi  को सब्सक्राइब करे: https://bit.ly/3gmWheM

Music by Epidemic Sound: https://www.epidemicsound.com/​ 

Stock materials: https://www.depositphotos.com​ 
https://www.shutterstock.com​

ये वीडियो मनोरंजन के लिए बनाई गई है। हम इसके पूरे होने, सुरक्षा और विश्वसनीयता की कोई वारंटी नही देते। इस वीडियो की जानकारी के हिसाब से आपका किया कोई भी काम आप अपने जोखिम पर करेंगे, और हम किसी भी नुकसान और घाटों के ज़िम्मेदार नही होंगे। अगर कोई इसे दोहराने का सोचे तो फैसला लेना, देखभाल और सावधानियों का इस्तेमाल करना देखने वाले की ज़िम्मेदारी है।

नीचे वीडियो में नियंत्रित वातावरण में हमारे कलाकारों द्वारा किया गया कार्य हो सकता है- अगर आप दोहराने का सोचे तो कृप्या विचार करें, देखभाल और सावधानियों का इस्तेमाल करें।

Credits:
Directed by Siddique Ismail
Produced by Siddique Ismail, Jenso Jose, Philipose K. Joseph, Manu Maliackal, Vaishak Rajan
Written by Siddique Ismail
Starring: Mohanlal, Arbaaz Khan
Music by Deepak Dev
Cinematography: Jithu Damodar
Edited by K. R. Gourishankar

Synopsis:
Sachidanandan (Mohanlal) has been serving double life imprisonment for the murders of the man who constantly troubled his stepmother and a police officer who harassed his friends in jail. He is finally released from the jail after long 24 years, thanks to the constant efforts of his younger brother Manu (Sarjano Khalid). However, life in jail has completely changed Sachidanandan who now wants to live peacefully with his family, and he finds it difficult to lead a normal life. Following some unexpected turns of events, Manu is kidnapped and Sachidanandan is forced to return to his old life to save his brother. What happens next forms the crux of the story.

snippet.title: Powerful Cyclone Brings Intense Rain, Wind to Mumbai, India
snippet.description:
A powerful cyclone is moving towards India’s western coast, Monday, May 17, bringing heavy rainfall and powerful winds to Mumbai. 
————————— 
READ MORE: A severe cyclone is roaring in the Arabian Sea off southwestern India with winds of up to 140 kph (87 mph), causing heavy rains and flooding. 

Cyclone Tauktae, the season's first major storm, is expected to make landfall early Tuesday in Gujarat state, a statement by the India Meteorological Department said. 

The massive storm will likely hamper India's fight against a surge of the coronavirus that's sweeping the country with devastating deaths, and the virus lockdown measures may slow relief work and damage from the storm could potentially destroy roads and cut vital supply lines. 

In areas along the Arabian Sea coast, four people were killed and 73 villages badly damaged on Sunday, according to the southwestern Karnataka state's disaster management authority. 
————————— 
LINK: https://www.voanews.com/south-central-asia/severe-cyclone-heading-toward-southern-india-killing-least-6

snippet.title: अगर खाना इंसान होता || खाने की मज़ेदार स्तिथियाँ 123 GO! SCHOOL से
snippet.description:
कभी सोचा है आपका खाना आपसे क्या कहता है?

क्या आपने कभी सोचा है कि आपका डिनर अगर इंसान होता तो कैसा होता?

इस वीडियो से आओ इमेजिन कर सकते हैं और मजे ले सकते हैं!

और इसे अपने दोस्तों के साथ शेयर करना बिल्कुल ना भूलें!!


क्या अभी तक ये देखे? हमारे युट्यूब चैनल 123 GO! SCHOOL को सब्सक्राइब करें ताकि आप कुछ भी मज़ेदार मिस ना करें!!
 

#123Go #food #fun

123 GO! SCHOOL Hindi  को सब्सक्राइब करे: https://bit.ly/3gmWheM

Music by Epidemic Sound: https://www.epidemicsound.com/​ 

Stock materials: https://www.depositphotos.com​ 
https://www.shutterstock.com​

ये वीडियो मनोरंजन के लिए बनाई गई है। हम इसके पूरे होने, सुरक्षा और विश्वसनीयता की कोई वारंटी नही देते। इस वीडियो की जानकारी के हिसाब से आपका किया कोई भी काम आप अपने जोखिम पर करेंगे, और हम किसी भी नुकसान और घाटों के ज़िम्मेदार नही होंगे। अगर कोई इसे दोहराने का सोचे तो फैसला लेना, देखभाल और सावधानियों का इस्तेमाल करना देखने वाले की ज़िम्मेदारी है।

नीचे वीडियो में नियंत्रित वातावरण में हमारे कलाकारों द्वारा किया गया कार्य हो सकता है- अगर आप दोहराने का सोचे तो कृप्या विचार करें, देखभाल और सावधानियों का इस्तेमाल करें।

snippet.title: Fitoor - Episode 23 Teaser - 20th May 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Fitoor - Episode 23 Teaser - 20th May 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Join the Har Pal Geo family ASAP. Subscribe and hit the bell icon for all your Pakistani drama needs https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Fitoor narrates a love story that transcends above all as a person in love is bound to forget about the worries of the past and the uncertainty of the future.
Despite being a successful architect, Haider feels lacking in his love life as he is still living with the memories of his love interest. On the other hand, Dilnasheen who hails from a middle-class background is deeply in love with her best friend's brother Hamza and both vows to be with each other forever without realizing the difficulties they might have to overcome. Living in her present, Dilnasheen�s life takes an unfortunate turn when she crosses paths with Haider. Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to forget their past and move on in their lives? Or will the past pay them a visit when they begin to settle down? Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to distinguish between their past and present?

Written By: Zanjabeel Asim
Directed By: Siraj ul Haq
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :
Faysal Quraishi

snippet.title: नीला खाना  या काला खाना | एपिक रंग और खाने का चैलेंज और अजीब पल रटाटा बूम द्वारा
snippet.description:
क्या आप अलग अलग  रंगों और स्वादिष्ट खाने  और मिठाई को एक साथ देख कर उत्साहित हो जाते हैं? तो फिर इस एपिक लड़ाई को देखे! इस बार दो सुंदर रंग - काला और नीला - खाने के चैलेंज  में टकराएंगे! क्या आपको लगता है कि इन फूलों का एक पूरा पहाड़ ढूंढना मुश्किल है? बेशक है, लेकिन हमने असंभव को संभव कर दिया है ताकि आप देखने का आनंद  ले  ! ऐसे ही और भी कई मजेदार वीडियो देखने के लिए हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें!
रटाटा  बूम को सब्सक्राइब करे :

#रटाटा बूम  #चैलेंज  #नीला या काला 

संगीत  एपिडेमिक साउंड द्वारा : https://www.epidemicsound.com/

j main manga lagge nakhre dikhaun

 ae

app gora mnu aakhree  brown

snippet.title: Lady Gangster (James Bond) New Released Hindi Dubbed Full Movie | Allari Naresh, Sakshi Choudhary
snippet.description:
Nani is a simple man. She is a software professional. He and his family hate getting into problems and lead a very simple life. A twist in the tale arises when he gets married to a lady don Bullet without knowing about her past and criminal activities. Halfway through his marriage, Nani comes to know about his wife's original background and decides to leave her and run away from the city. The rest of the story is as to how Nani manages to deal with these tricky situations and solves all his problems.

Cast: Allari Naresh, Sakshi Chaudhary And Others

snippet.description:

क्या हो अगर आपको पूरे दिन एक ही कलर का खाना खाना पढ़े?

हम किस बारे में बात कर रहे हैं?

बिल्कुल एक फ़ूड चैलेंज की! पर्पल! येल्लो! मजे करने का समय!

आप कैंडी समझ के क्या खाना चाहेंगे?

हमें कमैंट्स में बताएँ!

और इस वीडियो को आने दोस्तों के साथ शेयर करें और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Israeli Iron Dome filmed intercepting rockets from Gaza
snippet.description:
Sirens blared in the coastal Israeli city of Ashkelon as the Iron Dome missile defence system intercepted rockets in the sky.

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ► https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Despite having a high rate of success the system doesn't stop every attack and rockets fired from Gaza killed two women in Asheklon.

For the latest on Israel please visit: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/israel/

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

Telegraph.co.uk and YouTube.com/TelegraphTV are websites of The Telegraph, the UK's best-selling quality daily newspaper providing news and analysis on UK and world events, business, sport, lifestyle and culture.

दोस्तों, क्या आप एक नई चैलेंज के लिए तैयार हैं? फिर समय है, बड़ा या  मध्यम या  छोटा खाना चैलेंज  शुरू करने का जो पहले से ही आपका इंतजार कर रहा है! क्या आपने कभी एक विशाल कैंडी या एक आदमी के आकार के ओरिओ देखे हैं? या क्या आपने 30 सेकंड में एक बड़ी आइसक्रीम खाने की कोशिश की? हम आपको सब कुछ दिखाएंगे और स्वाद टेस्ट भी पास करने की कोशिश करेंगे! इस वीडियो को लाइक करें और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें ताकि आप कुछ भी मिस ना करे !

snippet.title: The Mummy Returns | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Open your Free Upstox Gold Account and get Free E-Gold worth Rs. 51 - https://upstox.com/open-gold-account/?utm_source=influencer&utm_medium=organic&utm_term=AshishChanchlaniMay21&f=G5LB

Sooo finally aa gayi hai humari NEW VIDEOO
Pehle toh bhai maaf kar do hum logo ne itna delay kar diya
Sabhi seth logo se maafi
Thoda ghar ki takleef aur team waalo ke family problems ke kaaran hum sab busy ho gaye the
But we are backkkkk 
Presenting to you humara new video “THE MUMMY RETURNS”
Ye waali mummy us egypt waali mummy se bhi danger hai lekin apni hai
Dekho ye video humne bahut safely shoot kiya hai aur ghar mein shoot kiya (aur koi option tha kya thanks to wo ghatiya virus)
Mere bhai @Jashan Sirwani  aur  @Tanish Sirwani  ko ghar pe bulaya chatai becha ke sulaya because social distancing zaroori hai aur fir unke saath ye video plan kiya
Is video mein hai padaishi maali @Ritesh Sadhwani aur khandaani daaku dikhne waala @Rohit Sadhwani 
Is video mein apni purani kaam waali bai bhi hai (haan wohi jisne mera valentine kharab kiya) wo  Bhavika Motwani jaise dikhne waali.
Is video mein @Kunal Chhabhria seth bhi hai
Lekin unhone apna part khud shoot kiya kyunki bhai ne khud ko quarrantine kar diya tha 
Lekin dedication dekh rahe ho launde ki? (Ghanta, sab paise ka khel hai babu bhaiya)
Lekin ye video banake bahut maza aaya kyunki maine triple role kiya toh kaafi dino baad swaad aa gaya
Baaki bhaiyo aur unki behno wig mein bahut garmi hoti hai
Mere paseeno ke lie is video ko like kar do seth log🙏
Aur video please end tak dekhna apni mummiyo ke saath 
Aapki puri family ke lie hi toh khaas banayi hai
Mummy se puch ke batana kaunsa scene unko acha laga aur comment karna wo
(Ho sake toh mummy ka reaction record karna)
Baaki meri taraf se saari mummiyo ko, wives,sisters as well as daughters ko bhi
Happy Mother’s day❤️🥺
Sabko puri ACV team ka bahut saara pyaar yaar
Apna sab dhyaan do please aur maa baap ka khaas kar, time kharab chal raha hai, lekin hum sab ek saath isse ladh lenge💪
Sending loads of love to all ACVIANS❤️
LOVE YOUU 
#AshishChanchlani  #TheMummyReturns #MothersDay

snippet.title: Israel Unrest: Hamas launches rocket attack on Tel Aviv
snippet.description:
Tensions between Israel and Hamas have further escalated, with Hamas firing 130 rockets towards the city of Tel Aviv.

Health officials in Gaza said 28 Palestinians, including nine children, had been killed in Israeli airstrikes.

snippet.title: Israel Palestine Conflict: 1000 year History | Jerusalem | Gaza | West Bank |  Dhruv Rathee
snippet.description:
How was the country of Israel born? When did Palestine came into being? In this video, I explain in detail the complete history of Israel - Palestine conflict which dates back to before the Ottoman empire. In 1917, the British promised Jews a separate country in the Balfour declaration. In 1947, the United Nations released a partition plan after which Israel first came into existence and immediately went to war in 1948 with the neighbouring Arab countries. Why did Israel and Palestine came so close to achieving peace in 1993? From the year 1000s to year 2021, this video takes you through the complete history of the region. 

Link to Hitler video: https://youtu.be/laisVDBJ204

snippet.title: ‘Full-scale war’ feared as fighting between Israel and Hamas escalates amid air strikes
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our YouTube channel for free here: 
https://sc.mp/subscribe-youtube

Spiralling violence between Israel and Hamas Islamists is “escalating towards a full-scale war”, the UN envoy for Middle East Peace warned on May 11, 2021. Tor Wennesland’s statement followed a day that saw the Palestinian militant group fire more than 600 rockets at Israel, which responded with hundreds of air strikes. The violence has left at least 30 Palestinians and three Israelis dead, with many more injured in the two days of fighting following rising tensions in Jerusalem at the start of the Muslim fasting month of Ramadan.

snippet.title: Israeli police attack Palestinians at al-Aqsa mosque in eviction protests
snippet.description:
Israeli police broke into the prayer room at the mosque in East Jerusalem as several hundred Palestinians stayed on after Friday prayers to protest against potential evictions of Palestinians from homes on land claimed by Jewish settlers. At least 178 Palestinians and six officers were injured in the night-time clashes at Islam’s third-holiest site and around East Jerusalem

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube ► http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

More than 205 Palestinians wounded in Jerusalem al-Aqsa clashes ► https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/may/08/israel-more-than-205-palestinians-wounded-in-jerusalem-al-aqsa-clashes

snippet.title: गोल्ड vs सिल्वर फ़ूड चैलेंज ! अगर कैंडी आईबॉल एक इंसान होती तो! एक रंग चैलेंज 123 GO! CHALLENGE पर
snippet.description:
चलो कुछ स्पार्कल को मिलाएं , और थोड़ा सा ग्लिटर ,और थोड़ा सी स्प्रिंकल्स की टॉपिंग । ये हमारा सबसे मजेदार और पसंदीदा चैलेंज है गोल्ड vs सिल्वर 😍
 

आपको क्या पसंद है : गोल्ड vs सिल्वर ? हमे कमैंट्स में बताए !

और इस वीडियो को आपने दोस्तो के साथ शेयर करना न भूले और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करे ऐसी ही और भी मज़ेदार वीडियो के लिए !

#123go #food #mukbang



सब्सक्राइब करें 123 GO! CHALLENGE Hindi  bit.ly/123gochallengehindi

Music by Epidemic Sound: https://www.epidemicsound.com/​ 
Stock materials: https://www.depositphotos.com​ https://www.shutterstock.com​


ये वीडियो मनोरंजन के लिए बनाई गई है। हम इसके पूरे होने, सुरक्षा और विश्वसनीयता की कोई वारंटी नही देते। इस वीडियो की जानकारी के हिसाब से आपका किया कोई भी काम आप अपने जोखिम पर करेंगे, और हम किसी भी नुकसान और घाटों के ज़िम्मेदार नही होंगे। अगर कोई इसे दोहराने का सोचे तो फैसला लेना, देखभाल और सावधानियों का इस्तेमाल करना देखने वाले की ज़िम्मेदारी है।

नीचे वीडियो में नियंत्रित वातावरण में हमारे कलाकारों द्वारा किया गया कार्य हो सकता है- अगर आप दोहराने का सोचे तो कृप्या विचार करें, देखभाल और सावधानियों का इस्तेमाल करें।

वीडियो में जिस भी कंपनी का नाम बताया गया वो होल्डर के ट्रेडमार्क या रजिस्टर्ड ट्रेडमार्क हैं। इनके इस्तेमाल का मतलब उनसे कोई सम्बन्ध या उनके द्वारा कोई अनुमति नहीं नहीं।

snippet.title: Buildings collapse as Israel carries out hundreds of airstrikes in Gaza
snippet.description:
Israel carried out hundreds of airstrikes in Gaza into Wednesday morning, while over the same period of time Hamas fired multiple rocket barrages at Tel Aviv and the Southern city of Beer Sheva. 

One multi-story residential building, a tower reported to be housing Hamas and other media outlets in Gaza City, was totally destroyed after Israel warned occupants in advance to evacuate, and another structure was heavily damaged in airstrikes. 

An Israeli airstrike also hit a car carrying three civilians, including a woman in Gaza City, Palestinian witnesses and health officials said.

At least 53 people have been killed in Hamas-ruled Gaza and six people in Israel since the violence escalated, according to officials.

For more info, please go to https://globalnews.ca/news/7855258/gaza-israel-palestine-rocket-strikes-civilians/

snippet.title: Israel rioting -  Netanyahu calls state of emergency in Lod as conflict intensifies
snippet.description:
Israel has declared a state of emergency in the central city of Lod after rioting by Israeli Arabs, as conflict between Israeli forces and Palestinian militants intensified.

Israeli Police said hundreds of people were arrested between May 11 and 12 amid riots and disturbances in several Israeli cities with mixed Jewish and Arab populations.

Riots prompted officials to declare a state of emergency in one city, Lod, where three synagogues and dozens of cars were set on fire, according to reports.

The unrest came as hundreds of rockets fired into Israel from Gaza left at least six dead, and Israeli strikes on the Strip killed at least 43, according to local health officials.

snippet.title: चीज़ें जो सिर्फ 1% लोग ही कर सकते हैं || असम्भव बॉडी ट्रिक्स 123 GO! CHALLENGE
snippet.description:
ये चैलेंज आपकी बॉडी को टेस्ट में रखेगा। सिर्फ 1% लोग ही ये अजीब, होश उड़ा देने वाली बॉडी ट्रिक्स कर सकते हैं। बढ़िया है ना?

आप इस चैलेंज के लिए खास हैं? तो इन ट्रिक्स को ट्राय करें। हमे कमैंट्स में अपने स्कोर बताएँ👇


अगर आपको ये चैलेंजस पसन्द आए तो हमारे युट्यूब चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें  और आपने दोस्तों के साथ शेयर करना भूलें!


#123GO #BodyTricks #FunnyPranks



सब्सक्राइब करें 123 GO! CHALLENGE Hindi  bit.ly/123gochallengehindi

Music by Epidemic Sound: https://www.epidemicsound.com/​ 
Stock materials: https://www.depositphotos.com​ https://www.shutterstock.com​


ये वीडियो मनोरंजन के लिए बनाई गई है। हम इसके पूरे होने, सुरक्षा और विश्वसनीयता की कोई वारंटी नही देते। इस वीडियो की जानकारी के हिसाब से आपका किया कोई भी काम आप अपने जोखिम पर करेंगे, और हम किसी भी नुकसान और घाटों के ज़िम्मेदार नही होंगे। अगर कोई इसे दोहराने का सोचे तो फैसला लेना, देखभाल और सावधानियों का इस्तेमाल करना देखने वाले की ज़िम्मेदारी है।

नीचे वीडियो में नियंत्रित वातावरण में हमारे कलाकारों द्वारा किया गया कार्य हो सकता है- अगर आप दोहराने का सोचे तो कृप्या विचार करें, देखभाल और सावधानियों का इस्तेमाल करें।

वीडियो में जिस भी कंपनी का नाम बताया गया वो होल्डर के ट्रेडमार्क या रजिस्टर्ड ट्रेडमार्क हैं। इनके इस्तेमाल का मतलब उनसे कोई सम्बन्ध या उनके द्वारा कोई अनुमति नहीं नहीं।

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra’s Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end. 

#VYRLOriginals #VishalMishra #AlyJasmin

snippet.title: The Act At The Railway Station | CID | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime
